articles.title: HCP Vault Dedicated introduces cluster disaster recovery (public preview)
articles.excerpt: HCP Vault Dedicated is a fully managed secrets management solution that organizations rely on for authentication, dynamic secrets, and encryption workflows. As a core piece of security infrastructure, the cost of downtime is too high to leave recovery to chance.

articles.title: Spotlight on WG Device Management
articles.excerpt: The rising popularity of AI, Edge, and Telecommunications workloads on Kubernetes has led to new requirements for hardware management. We now need hardware specification beyond CPU time and memory allocations.

articles.title: Enhanced data resilience with cross-region backups in Backup and DR Service
articles.excerpt: To maintain business continuity, you need a robust data-backup strategy. While multi-region backups offer the highest availability, many organizations want a more cost-effective way to protect their data against a regional outage, but still adhere to data residency requirements.
